plugins.name: Public API Plugin
plugins.description: Public, API-key-authenticated HTTP surface for Peckboard, served as a WASM plugin. Lets external clients list projects, list/create cards, and manage scoped API keys over a /plugin-api/* prefix.
plugins.author: PeckBoard

plugins.name: Common Tools
plugins.description: Common worker tools for Peckboard (math, web search/fetch/parse, file search, git, tests), served as a WASM plugin.
plugins.author: PeckBoard

plugins.name: Diff Viewer
plugins.description: Side-by-side viewer/editor for every file that differs from origin/main, including new files and images, served as a WASM plugin.
plugins.author: PeckBoard

plugins.name: Experts
plugins.description: Experts feature for Peckboard (knowledge / question / PM experts, MCP tools, and UI), served as a WASM plugin.
plugins.author: PeckBoard

plugins.name: Session Control
plugins.description: Control another Peckboard session from a session: interrupt, terminate the agent, clear, and send messages/images. Served as a WASM plugin.
plugins.author: PeckBoard
